protocol_notes: OP is posting on behalf of wife. Wife is mid-thirties, wheelchair bound after pubic bone fracture on top of pre-existing tendonitis and lipedema. Previously spent thousands of euros on lipedema surgeries 2020-2022. Currently using BCP-157 orally (500mcg split dose), EAAs, Aloe Vera Extract, multivitamin, Vitamin D/K, Calcium, and prioritizing protein. Considering SARMs (Ostarine, S4, LGD4033), AAS (Nandrolone/Anavar), PTH/Parathyroid, CJC-1295, Tesamorelin, Ipamorelin, MK-677, GLP-1, Retatrutide, and Bioregulators (Bone Marrow). GP is unsupportive. Wife is hesitant to inject so BCP-157 is being taken orally. Goal is to prevent muscle loss, support bone healing, control lipedema progression, and manage weight.
